description: Log in to Moodle (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) and navigate to the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course. Organize course materials by creating a Folder resource named "Week 1 Documents" with the description "Essential readings and safety forms for the first week." The folder must contain two files: "Syllabus_Supplement.txt" with the content "Grading policy update: Participation is now 15%." and "Lab_Safety_Checklist.txt" with the content "1. Wear safety goggles. 2. Tie back long hair." Configure the folder to display contents on a separate page and ensure the download folder button is enabled.
